description: A Mexican dish consisting of a folded or rolled tortilla filled with meat, beans, seafood, vegetables, or other ingredients and finished with toppings such as salsa, onion, cilantro, or lime.
preparation_steps: Cook or prepare the chosen filling.
Warm the tortillas so they are pliable.
Fill the tortillas and add toppings.

health_advice.benefits: Can be balanced with lean protein, beans, and fresh toppings.
health_advice.risks: Calories and sodium rise quickly with fried shells, large portions of cheese, or rich sauces.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose corn tortillas, lean fillings, and plenty of fresh salsa and vegetables.

dietary_notes.note: Corn-tortilla tacos are often gluten-free, but flour tortillas are not. Suitability depends on fillings and toppings.

allergens: Milk if cheese or sour cream is used
